name: YC Startup School
description: Free 10-week online program by Y Combinator with lectures, group office hours, and a global founder community — no equity taken.

name: iStart Rajasthan — Pre-Seed Grant
description: Government of Rajasthan gives up to ₹2.4 lakh in ideation-stage grants to registered startups; women-led startups get up to ₹3 lakh.

name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)
description: DPIIT scheme providing up to ₹20 lakh for proof-of-concept and up to ₹50 lakh for market-entry stage startups via empanelled incubators.

name: AICTE Productization Fellowship (APF)
description: AICTE initiative supporting innovative ideas from students in AICTE-approved institutions, aligned with Atmanirbhar Bharat goals.

name: Tally Forms
description: Free form builder for surveys, idea validation, and waitlist landing pages — no code required, unlimited responses on free plan.

name: Typeform
description: Conversational survey tool ideal for qualitative user research — free tier supports 10 questions and 100 responses/month.

name: Reddit (r/startups, r/Entrepreneur, r/IndiaBusiness)
description: Post your idea or problem hypothesis in active subreddits to get brutally honest feedback from founders and early adopters worldwide.

name: Bubble
description: Visual full-stack no-code platform for building web apps with databases, user auth, and APIs — free tier sufficient for MVPs.

name: Glide Apps
description: Turn a Google Sheet into a mobile app in minutes — ideal for internal tools, simple marketplaces, or directory MVPs.

name: Webflow
description: Professional website builder with CMS and hosting — use for landing pages, portfolios, or content-driven product sites without writing code.

name: Replit
description: Browser-based coding environment that lets you build, run, and deploy apps instantly — great for fast prototyping without local setup.

name: Vercel
description: Free hosting for frontend apps and serverless functions — deploy a Next.js or React MVP from GitHub in under 2 minutes.

name: Supabase
description: Open-source Firebase alternative with PostgreSQL database, auth, and storage — generous free tier for early-stage products.

name: GrowthMentor
description: On-demand 1:1 mentorship calls with vetted startup operators — free plan includes limited sessions; useful for targeted advice.

name: LinkedIn Startup Communities
description: Search LinkedIn groups and newsletters for domain-specific founder communities — useful for warm intros and advisor discovery.

name: iStart Nest — Virtual Incubation Program
description: Government of Rajasthan's virtual incubation program giving startups mentorship, exposure, and access to the iStart ecosystem remotely.

name: Antler
description: Global early-stage VC program that invests in founders from day zero — India cohorts run in Bangalore; provides stipend, co-founder matching, and seed capital.

name: Entrepreneur First (EF) India
description: Pre-team, pre-idea program that recruits ambitious individuals, pays a stipend, and helps form founding teams — invests at incorporation.

name: First Round Capital Essays
description: Deep, practitioner-written articles on company building — covers hiring, product, culture, and early traction; free and one of the best reading lists for founders.

name: Lenny's Newsletter
description: Weekly deep dives on product-market fit, growth, and early-stage product decisions — free tier covers most foundational content.

name: Paul Graham Essays
description: Timeless essays on startups, ideas, and founder psychology from the co-founder of Y Combinator — read 'Do Things That Don't Scale' first.

name: Coursera — Product Management by Google
description: Free-to-audit Google PM certificate on Coursera covering problem framing, MVP design, and user research — practical and structured.

name: Notion (Free Plan)
description: All-in-one workspace for documenting assumptions, tracking milestones, and building lightweight internal tools — free for individuals.

name: Airtable (Free Tier)
description: Spreadsheet-database hybrid for managing user research, resource tracking, or lightweight CRM — free for up to 1,000 records.

name: IndiaMART Community Forums
description: India's largest B2B platform — browse supplier listings and buyer RFQs to understand real demand signals in physical-product categories.

name: Statista (Free Reports)
description: Access free-tier market size reports, industry charts, and consumer behavior data across hundreds of sectors globally.

name: Google Trends
description: Free tool to track search interest over time for any keyword — useful for validating whether a problem is growing, shrinking, or seasonal.

name: Discord (community building)
description: Build a small private server for early adopters or beta testers — free, instant, and lets you run async feedback sessions with real users.

name: WhatsApp Business API (via Twilio)
description: Run lightweight user interviews and onboarding flows over WhatsApp — highly effective for India-specific user research with non-English audiences.

name: NASSCOM 10,000 Startups
description: India's largest startup enablement program connecting founders with mentors, investors, and enterprise clients across sectors.

name: Startup India DPIIT Recognition
description: Get DPIIT-recognized startup status — unlocks tax benefits, fast-track IP filing, and eligibility for all central government startup schemes.

name: Figma (Free Plan)
description: Industry-standard design tool for building wireframes, mockups, and clickable prototypes — free for up to 3 active projects.

name: Lean Canvas (Miro Template)
description: Free one-page business model canvas on Miro — forces you to articulate problem, solution, key metrics, and unfair advantage in under 20 minutes.

name: AWS Activate (Founders Tier)
description: Free AWS credits for early-stage startups — up to $1,000 in cloud credits plus technical support to build and host your MVP.

name: Microsoft for Startups (Founders Hub)
description: Free Azure credits up to $150K, GitHub Copilot access, and Microsoft 365 for qualifying startups — no equity taken.

name: The Minimalist Entrepreneur (Book Summary)
description: Sahil Lavingia's framework for building a profitable, community-first business without VC funding — free summary and key excerpts widely available.

name: Ycombinator Requests for Startups
description: YC's publicly updated list of problem spaces they want founders to work on — useful for validating if your idea is in a high-signal area.

name: Internshala (User Research Recruitment)
description: India's largest internship platform — post a paid micro-task or survey to recruit student participants for quick user research at low cost.

name: LNMIIT Incubation Centre (TBI)
description: Technology Business Incubator at LNM Institute of Information Technology, Jaipur — provides mentorship, workspace, and seed funding access to student founders.

name: Zoho One (Startup Bundle)
description: Suite of 40+ business apps (CRM, email, forms, projects) with a free trial — useful for student teams building lean internal operations.
